# Extract Model Fitted Values

Returns fitted values from an object of class `logitr`.

## Usage

``` r
# S3 method for class 'logitr'
fitted(object, probs = NULL, ...)
```

## Arguments

- object:

  is an object of class `logitr` (a model estimated using the
  [`logitr()`](https://jhelvy.github.io/logitr/reference/logitr.md)
  function).

- probs:

  Predicted probabilities for an object of class `logitr` to use in
  computing fitted values Defaults to `NULL`.

- ...:

  further arguments.

## Value

A data frame of the `obsID` and the fitted values extracted from
`object`.

## Examples

``` r
library(logitr)

# Estimate a preference space model
mnl_pref <- logitr(
  data    = yogurt,
  outcome = "choice",
  obsID   = "obsID",
  pars    = c("price", "feat", "brand")
)
#> Running model...
#> Done!

# Extract the fitted values from the model
fitted(mnl_pref)
```
